category_sources: source_facts.description says cmix is a data compression program with high compression ratio; the official homepage describes it as lossless data compression.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cmix; official homepage title uses CMIX for the same project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Byron Knoll cmix page and includes project description, downloads, benchmarks, and the official GitHub repository link.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/byronknoll/cmix, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states high-ratio data compression; official homepage describes lossless compression benchmarks.
